letters.A: Closed fist, thumb to the side (like holding a ball).
letters.B: Flat hand, fingers together, thumb in.
letters.C: Curved hand, like the letter C.
letters.D: Index finger up, other fingers closed, thumb on middle finger.
letters.F: OK sign: thumb and index touch, other fingers up.
letters.G: Index finger pointing, thumb across palm.
letters.H: Index and middle fingers side by side, pointing.
letters.I: Pinky up, other fingers closed, thumb in.
letters.J: Pinky traces a J in the air.
letters.K: Index and middle form a V, thumb between them.
letters.L: Index and thumb form L shape.
letters.M: Three fingers (index, middle, ring) down on thumb.
letters.O: Fingers and thumb form a circle.
letters.P: K shape turned upside down, wrist twist.
letters.Q: G shape with index and thumb down.
letters.S: Fist with thumb in front of fingers.
letters.U: Index and middle together, pointing up.
letters.V: Index and middle spread in V shape.
letters.Y: Thumb and pinky out (like hang loose).
letters.Z: Index finger draws Z in the air.

digits.6: Thumb and pinky touch, others up.
digits.7: Thumb touches middle, index and ring up.
digits.8: Thumb and middle touch, index up.
digits.9: Thumb and ring touch, index up.

words.Hi: Wave hand at side, palm forward.
words.ThankYou: Fingers from lips forward (one or two hands).
words.Yes: Fist nodding up and down (like nodding yes).
words.No: Index and middle tap thumb (finger-spread no).
words.Help: Thumb up, other hand taps or supports.
words.Name: Index and middle tap other hand.
words.What: Open hands, palms up, slight shake.
words.Where: Index finger waves side to side.
words.We: Index sweeps from chest to include others.
words.Home: Fingers and thumb touch at cheek (roof).
words.Understand: Index at forehead, then fist out.
words.Deaf: Index from ear to mouth or finger on ear.
